name: URINARY BLADDER

demographics.Histo: low-grade B-cell mucosa-associated lymphoid tissue (MALT) / diffuse
demographics.Prevalence: India (13÷100,000); less common in western hemisphere

dominant_finding: collaterals: ← gonadal veins, ascending lumbar veins, vertebral plexus,
discriminating_features: collaterals: ← gonadal veins, ascending lumbar veins, vertebral plexus,
notching of distal ureter by ureteral veins
medial displacement of pelvic segment of ureters

general: collaterals: ← gonadal veins, ascending lumbar veins, vertebral plexus,
notching of distal ureter by ureteral veins
medial displacement of pelvic segment of ureters
thickened bladder wall + decreased bladder volume
typically of low attenuation on CT
"target" sign on T2WI in plexiform neurofibroma= central hypointense

clinical.Rx: surgical extraction, lithotripsy, alkalinization of urine
